message: Since league/oauth2-server-bundle 1.2: League\Bundle\OAuth2ServerBundle\Tests\Fixtures\FakeLegacyGrant implements custom grant using League\Bundle\OAuth2ServerBundle\AuthorizationServer\GrantTypeInterface interface which is deprecated. Instead use League\OAuth2\Server\Grant\GrantTypeInterface interface and tag league.oauth2_server.authorization_server.grant configuration. See : https://github.com/thephpleague/oauth2-server-bundle/blob/v1.2.0/docs/implementing-custom-grant-type.md
